title: TaskTree
description: The complete set of tasks for a single game, produced by the Architect agent.

game_slug.description: URL-safe identifier for the game, matching the directory name under games/.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this task tree was generated.

last_updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent update to this task tree.

tasks.description: Ordered list of all tasks. Order is not execution order — use depends_on for that.

title.description: Short title for the task. Should be completable as a sentence starting with 'Implement...' or 'Create...'.

type.description: The category of work this task involves.

description.description: Full description of what this task requires. Should include what to build, what it connects to, and any known constraints from the spec.

estimated_complexity.description: Rough size estimate. low = under 30 min, medium = 30-60 min, high = 60-90 min.

estimated_minutes.description: Estimated implementation time in minutes. Filled in by milestone-planner, not parse-spec.

actual_minutes.description: Actual time taken. Filled in by Builder after completion.

depends_on.description: List of task dependencies. Filled in by dependency-mapper, not parse-spec.

task_id.description: ID of the task this task depends on.

type.description: hard = cannot start until dependency is merged. soft = easier after dependency, but can start independently.

assignee.description: Which agent will execute this task.

status.description: Current execution state of this task.

milestone_id.description: ID of the milestone this task belongs to. Filled in by milestone-planner.

pr_reference.description: GitHub PR URL or number for the PR that implemented this task. Filled in by Builder.

ambiguity_notes.description: Notes about anything in the spec that was unclear when this task was created. Architect fills this in when a task has ambiguous requirements.

failure_reason.description: If status is failed, a short description of why the task failed.
